title: Stanbic IBTC Partners Media Practitioners On Essentials Of Reporting New Trends … Covers Cybercrime Act, Facts Checking & Others - FinancialEDGE
description: Stanbic IBTC Holdings Plc has partnered with the media practitioners on the need to understand essentials of reporting new trends in the journalism profession, especially with the proliferation of citizen journalists. The training, which was facilitated by experts from TMTR Training Room, took place on Thursday 30th, May 2024 at Stanbic IBTC Holding Headquarter and
html:
Stanbic IBTC Holdings Plc has partnered with the media practitioners on the need to understand essentials of reporting new trends in the journalism profession, especially with the proliferation of citizen journalists.

The training, which was facilitated by experts from TMTR Training Room, took place on Thursday 30th, May 2024 at Stanbic IBTC Holding Headquarter and had media practitioners drawn from across online and traditional media outfits.
